/usr/bin/ar qc libkairo_engine.a CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/audio/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/core/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/core/job_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/ecs/archetype.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/ecs/prefab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/ecs/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/editor/asset_browser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/editor/console_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/editor/editor_panels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/editor/gizmo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/editor/imgui_layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/editor/profiler_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/gameplay/animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/gameplay/pathfinding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/gameplay/steering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/batch_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/camera_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/debug_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/effects/bloom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/effects/vignette.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/frame_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/framebuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/post_process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/shader_watcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/shadows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/sprite_sheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/tilemap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/graphics/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/input/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/particles/particle_emitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/physics/circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/physics/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/physics/joints.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/physics/physics_world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/physics/raycast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/physics/spatial_grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/scene/scene_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/scene/scene_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/scripting/script_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_engine.dir/scripting/script_hot_reload.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libkairo_engine.a
